## Type
- [ ] feat (new functionality)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] docs
- [ ] test

## Checklist
- [ ] Branch follows naming convention (`feature/<module>-<desc>`)
- [ ] Commits use meaningful messages (Conventional Commits)
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated and passing locally (`mvn test` / `pnpm build`)
- [ ] No changes to already-merged Flyway migrations (new `V*` file if schema changed)
- [ ] Inline documentation added where needed
- [ ] Reviewed by at least one member of another team
